description: Fix biome formatting violation in the ynab plugin that causes CI check:plugins to fail.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/ynab && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix formatting in list-scheduled-transactions.ts
userStories.description: Run biome format on the ynab plugin to fix a line-wrap formatting violation in list-scheduled-transactions.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: The assignment `const raw = result.changed_entities?.be_scheduled_transactions ?? [];` is on a single line
`biome format --check src/` exits 0 with no changes needed
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/ynab/src/tools/list-scheduled-transactions.ts (formatting fix)

Context:
The CI `check:plugins` job runs `biome format src/` on every plugin and fails because this file has a formatting violation.

Changes:
Line 27-28 currently reads:
```
    const raw =
      result.changed_entities?.be_scheduled_transactions ?? [];
```
Biome wants it collapsed to a single line:
```
    const raw = result.changed_entities?.be_scheduled_transactions ?? [];
```

The simplest fix is to run `npx biome format --write src/` in the plugin directory. Only this one file has a violation.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change any logic, only formatting
- Do NOT modify any other files
